name: Superfast Vegetarian Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp Dried crushed red pepper flakes
16 oz Baked cheese pizza crust (such as Boboli)
1/2 cup Oil-pick sun-dried tomatoes, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
3. Add zucchini and yellow squash; sauté until almost tender, about 5 minutes.
4. Stir in red pepper flakes and mushroom sauce.
5. Place pizza crust on a baking sheet.
6. Spread the mushroom sauce evenly over the crust.
7. Sprinkle with minced garlic, shredded mozzarella, and chopped tomatoes.
8. Add the cooked vegetable mixture to the pizza.
9. Sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese.
10. Bake until the cheese melts and the crust is crisp, about 13 minutes.
